testcase.name: registerUserAutoCreatesWallet
testcase.system-out:
10:34:14.152 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest]: WalletFeatureIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 10:34:16.067 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.wallet.WalletServiceApplication for test class com.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest

senderUserId=049ca5d1-2126-4a4d-9b51-ea9280c5689f response={"success":true,"message":"User registered successfully","data":{"id":"049ca5d1-2126-4a4d-9b51-ea9280c5689f","fullName":"Alice Sender","email":"alice-cfc5e70a-0da1-463d-b3a9-d3d0005de317@test.com","phone":"08012345678","passwordHash":"$2a$10$925d3I2cOj5RyMtRFqUT7O0QK9/7kQcLDwDLrC1Z0NAL1vUfKOgbW","bvn":null,"nin":null,"kycTier":"TIER_1","kycStatus":"PENDING","active":true,"createdAt":"2026-06-23T10:35:30.90323","wallet":null}} testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/macbook/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.5/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.5.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: registerReceiver
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T10:35:34.116+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.WalletService : Creating wallet for userId=c0b93d86-fda7-454e-935e-d30d0c8d672a 2026-06-23T10:35:34.143+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] c.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest : [REGISTER] receiverUserId=c0b93d86-fda7-454e-935e-d30d0c8d672a accountNumber=207334117

testcase.name: transferCreatesAuditTrail
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T10:35:34.588+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.TransferService : Transfer request: senderUserId=049ca5d1-2126-4a4d-9b51-ea9280c5689f ref=TXN-d6e64e55-4e72-464a-a6f7-cae9ce568489 amount=15000.00 receiver=207334117 2026-06-23T10:35:34.638+01:00 DEBUG 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.KycLimitService : Validating KYC limits for walletId=7d707f33-659b-4149-81fd-feb082e541e1 tier=TIER_1 amount=15000.00 2026-06-23T10:35:34.933+01:00 DEBUG 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.KycLimitService : KYC walletId=7d707f33-659b-4149-81fd-feb082e541e1 amount=15000.00 fee=0 ref=TXN-d6e64e55-4e72-464a-a6f7-cae9ce568489-DR 2026-06-23T10:35:35.220+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.WalletService : Credit walletId=fd1bcb40-d208-4fb7-b93a-a1837e22535e amount=15000.00 ref=TXN-d6e64e55-4e72-464a-a6f7-cae9ce568489-CR 2026-06-23T10:35:35.234+01:00 INFO 78317 --- c.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest : [TRANSFER] response={"success":true,"message":"Transfer processed","data":{"reference":"TXN-d6e64e55-4e72-464a-a6f7-cae9ce568489","amount":15000.00,"status":"SUCCESS","receiverAccountNumber":"fd1bcb40-d208-4fb7-b93a-a1837e22535e","timestamp":null}} 2026-06-23T10:35:35.639+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] c.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest : [AUDIT] sender transactions=[{"reference":"TXN-d6e64e55-4e72-464a-a6f7-cae9ce568489-DR","type":"DEBIT","amount":15000.0,"fee":0.0,"balanceBefore":100000.0,"balanceAfter":85000.0,"status":"SUCCESS","transactionType":"WALLET_TRANSFER","createdAt":"2026-06-23T10:35:35.283129"},{"reference":"FUND-ALICE","type":"CREDIT","amount":100000.0,"fee":0.0,"balanceBefore":0.0,"balanceAfter":100000.0,"status":"SUCCESS","transactionType":"FUNDING","createdAt":"2026-06-23T10:35:32.839178"}]

testcase.name: idempotentTransferByReference
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T10:35:35.839+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.TransferService : Transfer request: senderUserId=049ca5d1-2126-4a4d-9b51-ea9280c5689f ref=IDEM-2374b62a-584c-4c1e-8276-d88519012694 amount=5000.00 receiver=207334117 2026-06-23T10:35:35.954+01:00 DEBUG 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.KycLimitService : Validating testcase.name: kycSingleTransferLimitEnforced
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T10:35:36.381+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.TransferService : Transfer request: senderUserId=049ca5d1-2126-4a4d-9b51-ea9280c5689f ref=KYC-SINGLE-6979ee0c-4f2a-4779-9a2d-3363286745e0 amount=60000.00 receiver=207334117 2026-06-23T10:35:36.415+01:00 DEBUG 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.KycLimitService : Validating KYC limits for walletId=7d707f33-659b-4149-81fd-feb082e541e1 tier=TIER_1 amount=60000.00 2026-06-23T10:35:36.416+01:00 WARN 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.KycLimitService : Single transfer limit exceeded: tier=TIER_1 amount=60000.00 limit=50000.00 2026-06-23T10:35:36.500+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] c.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest : [KYC] single limit rejection={"error":"Transfer amount exceeds single transfer limit for your tier"}

testcase.name: getBalance
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T10:35:36.581+01:00 DEBUG 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.WalletService : Balance for userId=049ca5d1-2126-4a4d-9b51-ea9280c5689f: balance=80000.0000, ledger=80000.0000 2026-06-23T10:35:36.633+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] c.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest : [BALANCE] {"success":true,"message":"Balance fetched successfully","data":{"accountNumber":"207330935","currency":"NGN","balance":80000.0000,"ledgerBalance":80000.0000}}

testcase.name: atomicTransferRollsBackOnInsufficientFunds
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T10:35:36.899+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.TransferService : Transfer request: senderUserId=049ca5d1-2126-4a4d-9b51-ea9280c5689f ref=FAIL-82de204f-a6af-4a4f-82ad-3f726ab2cc13 amount=85000.00 receiver=207334117 2026-06-23T10:35:36.963+01:00 DEBUG 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.KycLimitService : Validating KYC limits for walletId=7d707f33-659b-4149-81fd-feb082e541e1 tier=TIER_1 amount=85000.00 2026-06-23T10:35:36.964+01:00 WARN 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] com.wallet.service.KycLimitService : Single transfer limit exceeded: tier=TIER_1 amount=85000.00 limit=50000.00 2026-06-23T10:35:37.036+01:00 INFO 78317 --- [wallet-service] [ main] c.wallet.WalletFeatureIntegrationTest : [ATOMIC] balance before=80000.0000 after failed transfer=80000.0000
